'''dzhabho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:bird|bird]]".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dzh-bh-?
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bird|bird]]
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dzhæbhi?ith|dzhæbhi?ith]] || [[word:dzhæbhi?ij|dzhæbhi?ij]] || [[word:dzhæbhi?ish|dzhæbhi?ish]] || [[word:dzhæbhi?i|dzhæbhi?i]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dzhabhubhu?uth|dzhabhubhu?uth]] || [[word:dzhabhubhu?uj|dzhabhubhu?uj]] || [[word:dzhabhubhu?ush|dzhabhubhu?ush]] || [[word:dzhabhubhu?u|dzhabhubhu?u]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dzhabhu?uth|dzhabhu?uth]] || [[word:dzhabhu?uj|dzhabhu?uj]] || [[word:dzhabhu?ush|dzhabhu?ush]] || [[word:dzhabhu?u|dzhabhu?u]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dzhabhuf?ufth|dzhabhuf?ufth]] || [[word:dzhabhuf?ufj|dzhabhuf?ufj]] || [[word:dzhabhuf?ufsh|dzhabhuf?ufsh]] || [[word:dzhabhuf?uf|dzhabhuf?uf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dzhæbhe?eth|dzhæbhe?eth]] || [[word:dzhæbhe?ej|dzhæbhe?ej]] || [[word:dzhæbhe?esh|dzhæbhe?esh]] || [[word:dzhæbhe?e|dzhæbhe?e]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dzhabhobho?oth|dzhabhobho?oth]] || [[word:dzhabhobho?oj|dzhabhobho?oj]] || [[word:dzhabhobho?osh|dzhabhobho?osh]] || [[word:dzhabhobho?o|dzhabhobho?o]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dzhabho?oth|dzhabho?oth]] || [[word:dzhabho?oj|dzhabho?oj]] || [[word:dzhabho?osh|dzhabho?osh]] || [[word:dzhabho?o|dzhabho?o]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dzhabhof?ofth|dzhabhof?ofth]] || [[word:dzhabhof?ofj|dzhabhof?ofj]] || [[word:dzhabhof?ofsh|dzhabhof?ofsh]] || [[word:dzhabhof?of|dzhabhof?of]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[paucal]] || [[word:dzhabhïf?ïfth|dzhabhïf?ïfth]] || [[word:dzhabhïf?ïfj|dzhabhïf?ïfj]] || [[word:dzhabhïf?ïfsh|dzhabhïf?ïfsh]] || [[word:dzhabhïf?ïf|dzhabhïf?ïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plentiful]] || [[word:dzhabhïfbhïf?ïfth|dzhabhïfbhïf?ïfth]] || [[word:dzhabhïfbhïf?ïfj|dzhabhïfbhïf?ïfj]] || [[word:dzhabhïfbhïf?ïfsh|dzhabhïfbhïf?ïfsh]] || [[word:dzhabhïfbhïf?ïf|dzhabhïfbhïf?ïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dzhæbhæ?æth|dzhæbhæ?æth]] || [[word:dzhæbhæ?æj|dzhæbhæ?æj]] || [[word:dzhæbhæ?æsh|dzhæbhæ?æsh]] || [[word:dzhæbhæ?æ|dzhæbhæ?æ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dzhabhabha?ath|dzhabhabha?ath]] || [[word:dzhabhabha?aj|dzhabhabha?aj]] || [[word:dzhabhabha?ash|dzhabhabha?ash]] || [[word:dzhabhabha?a|dzhabhabha?a]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dzhabha?ath|dzhabha?ath]] || [[word:dzhabha?aj|dzhabha?aj]] || [[word:dzhabha?ash|dzhabha?ash]] || [[word:dzhabha?a|dzhabha?a]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dzhabhaf?afth|dzhabhaf?afth]] || [[word:dzhabhaf?afj|dzhabhaf?afj]] || [[word:dzhabhaf?afsh|dzhabhaf?afsh]] || [[word:dzhabhaf?af|dzhabhaf?af]]
|}

''56 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dzhabha?atha|dzhabha?atha]] || [[word:dzhabha?aja|dzhabha?aja]] || [[word:dzhabha?asha|dzhabha?asha]] || [[word:dzhabha?aka|dzhabha?aka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dzhabha?ath|dzhabha?ath]] || [[word:dzhabha?aj|dzhabha?aj]] || [[word:dzhabha?ash|dzhabha?ash]] || [[word:dzhabha?a|dzhabha?a]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dzhabha?athal|dzhabha?athal]] || [[word:dzhabha?ajal|dzhabha?ajal]] || [[word:dzhabha?ashal|dzhabha?ashal]] || [[word:dzhabha?akal|dzhabha?akal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dzhabha?aathatha|dzhabha?aathatha]] || [[word:dzhabha?aajaja|dzhabha?aajaja]] || [[word:dzhabha?aashasha|dzhabha?aashasha]] || [[word:dzhabha?aaka|dzhabha?aaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dzhabha?athan|dzhabha?athan]] || [[word:dzhabha?ajan|dzhabha?ajan]] || [[word:dzhabha?ashan|dzhabha?ashan]] || [[word:dzhabha?akan|dzhabha?akan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dzhabha?athaoro|dzhabha?athaoro]] || [[word:dzhabha?ajaoro|dzhabha?ajaoro]] || [[word:dzhabha?ashaoro|dzhabha?ashaoro]] || [[word:dzhabha?akaoro|dzhabha?akaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Words a249b1f]]

{{wordpage|e161e0a}}
